A '''battle''' took place in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], near a [[White dwarf/Legends|white dwarf]] between [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]]. A [[Peace Brigade]] operation to transfer [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] via [[CorDuro Shipping]] was foiled by an ambush of the [[Wild Knights]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] on the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], evacuating [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] from Corellia, participated in the battle as well.
